snippet.title: CEO Bernard Looney on bp's Strategic Transformation - CSC Global Leadership Series
snippet.description:
Bernard Looney CEO of bp discusses the company's strategic transformation and net zero by 2050 aspirations.

CSC Global Alumni in partnership with CSC UK hosted the launch of the Global Leadership Series in the United Kingdom on the 8th of September 2021.

In the presence of Her Royal Highness The Princess Royal, the CEO of bp, Bernard Looney, discussed leadership and sustainability within the context of climate, communities, energy and the environment. The event was hosted at Coutts London by CEO and CSC UK Vice Chair,​ Peter Flavel​, and CSC UK Chair Sir Alan Parker CVO. 

CSC alumni from over 25 Commonwealth countries attended the event via video link.

snippet.title: BP CEO Bernard Looney On The Green Transition
snippet.description:
Bernard Looney, CEO of BP took the reins of the company at a time when the oil industry faces increasing pressure to decarbonize from both investors and the public. Looney sits down with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua for a wide ranging conversation about the green transition.

snippet.title: Leaders with Lacqua: Bernard Looney, BP CEO
snippet.description:
Bernard Looney is a pandemic leader, taking over as CEO of one of the world's largest oil companies just weeks before Covid-19 shut down the global economy. It's also been a time of increasing pressure from activists and investors on the industry to decarbonize. Looney joins Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua for a wide-ranging conversation about his career, overhauling a company during the pandemic, and opportunities in the energy transition. 
 --------

snippet.title: Diess talks to Bernard Looney about #Flexpole, #electrification and the #IDBUZZ
snippet.description:
That’s a powerful partnership! #VolkswagenGroup and #bp are working together to build 4,000 #charging stations in Europe.

The fact that such global players are committed to electrification and sustainable mobility shows that we are on the right track. With our Flexpole (built in China & Germany) we are becoming a supplier for #Aral – win-win!

Watch the ride of our CEO Herbert Diess with bp CEO Bernard Looney in our ID. BUZZ.

------------------
Further information can be found on http://www.volkswagenag.com and on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/vwgroup

Note in accordance with Directive 1999/94/EC in its currently applicable version: Further information on official fuel consumption figures and the official specific CO2 emissions of new passenger cars can be found in the EU guide "Information on the fuel consumption, CO2 emissions and energy consumption of new cars", which is available free of charge at all sales dealerships, from DAT Deutsche Automobil Treuhand GmbH, Hellmuth-Hirth-Straße 1, D-73760 Ostfildern, Germany and at www.dat.de.
